title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF ASIA, PROVINCE OF OCCIDENTAL NEGROS, TO MUNICIPALITY OF HINOBA-AN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 611 / 55 OG No. 22, 4012 (June 1, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2154, April 24, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF ASIA, PROVINCE OF OCCIDENTAL NEGROS, TO MUNICIPALITY OF HINOBA-AN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Asia, Province of Occidental Negros, is changed to Municipality of Hinoba-an, and its seat of government shall be, as it is now, the site of the present barrio of Hinoba-an.

SEC. 2. Executive Order Numbered One hundred eighty-six series of 1948, is amended accordingly.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 24, 1959.
